reasoning: The control AC-17 (1) focuses on monitoring and controlling remote access, which in the context of Kubernetes can be mapped to ensuring that network access is restricted and monitored. This involves using NetworkPolicies to enforce default deny rules for ingress and egress traffic, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services to prevent exposing services unnecessarily, and ensuring that any ingress traffic is secured with TLS. These measures help in controlling and monitoring remote access to Kubernetes resources.
title: Remote Access | Monitoring and Control
